# Australian Privacy Law

An analysis of the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and its amendments, covering the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs), the role of the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC), and recent legislative reforms including the Privacy Legislation Amendment (Enforcement and Other Measures) Act 2022 (Cth).

This doc set examines the regulatory framework, key court decisions, and practical compliance requirements for organisations operating in Australian jurisdictions.
